stories.title: Implement create task with title and due date
criteria: Given the user taps the Add Task button, When they enter a title and optional due date and confirm, Then the task appears in the list sorted by due date ascending
Given the user submits the Add Task form with an empty title, When they tap Save, Then an inline validation error is shown and no task is created

stories.title: Implement mark task complete and incomplete toggle
criteria: Given an incomplete task is visible, When the user taps its checkbox, Then the task title renders with strikethrough and muted colour and the task moves to the Completed filter view
Given a completed task is visible, When the user taps its checkbox again, Then the task is restored to incomplete state and returns to the Incomplete filter view

stories.title: Implement swipe-to-delete task with confirmation
criteria: Given a task row is displayed, When the user performs a swipe-left gesture, Then a red Delete button is revealed and tapping it prompts a confirmation dialog
Given the confirmation dialog is shown, When the user confirms deletion, Then the task is permanently removed from the list and local storage

stories.title: Implement filter toggle for incomplete and complete tasks
criteria: Given the task list screen is open, When the user taps the Incomplete filter tab, Then only tasks with is_complete equal to false are displayed in the list
Given the user switches to the Complete filter tab, When the toggle state changes, Then only tasks with is_complete equal to true are displayed without any navigation change

stories.title: Build main task list screen layout
criteria: Given the app launches, When the main screen renders, Then the full-screen scrollable task list, filter toggle at top, and FAB Add button are all visible without horizontal overflow
Given no tasks exist or none match the active filter, When the list area renders, Then a contextually appropriate empty-state message and illustration are displayed

stories.title: Build Add Task bottom sheet modal
criteria: Given the user taps the Add Task FAB, When the bottom sheet animates up, Then a title text input, date picker, and Save and Cancel buttons are visible and interactive
Given the Add Task sheet is open, When the user taps Cancel or swipes down to dismiss, Then the sheet closes and no task is created

stories.title: Design and deliver all UI component assets
criteria: Given the UI spec is finalized, When the 3d_team delivers assets, Then task row, filter toggle, empty-state illustration, and app icon assets are provided in correct sizes for iOS and Android
Given assets are imported into the project, When QA reviews on a physical device, Then no assets appear blurry, misaligned, or clipped on iPhone 8 and a mid-range Android device

stories.title: Implement checkbox completion micro-animation
criteria: Given a task is marked complete, When the checkbox state changes, Then a checkmark draw animation or brief colour pulse plays within 300 milliseconds
Given a low-performance device, When the animation plays, Then UI frame rate does not drop below 60fps during the completion animation

stories.title: Implement local SQLite database for task persistence
criteria: Given a task is created, When the user closes and reopens the app, Then all tasks including title, due date, completion state, and created timestamp are restored exactly as left

Given the task schema requires id, title, due_date, is_complete, and created_at fields, When the database is initialized on first launch, Then the schema is created correctly and a migration path exists for future versions

stories.title: Implement full CRUD operations on task data layer
criteria: Given the data layer is implemented, When create, read, update, and delete operations are called programmatically, Then each operation completes without error and the in-memory list reflects the updated database state
Given rapid successive task operations such as create then immediately delete, When the operations are executed, Then no data corruption, duplicate records, or crash occurs in the local database

stories.title: Produce optional SFX for task completion and delete
criteria: Given the app includes SFX assets, When a task is marked complete, Then a soft tap sound plays if SFX is enabled and no sound plays if SFX is disabled
Given a task is deleted, When the deletion is confirmed, Then a subtle swipe or dismiss sound plays only when SFX is toggled on in settings

stories.title: Implement SFX settings toggle in app
criteria: Given the settings screen or control exists, When the user toggles SFX off, Then no sounds play for any subsequent task interaction until toggled back on
Given the user sets SFX preference, When the app is closed and reopened, Then the SFX toggle state is persisted and restored correctly

stories.title: Prepare and submit iOS App Store build
criteria: Given a release build is ready, When it is submitted via App Store Connect, Then the app passes automated review checks including privacy declaration, app icon sizing, and minimum iOS 15 compatibility
Given the app is approved, When a QA tester installs it on an iPhone 8 running iOS 15, Then all core task functions work correctly with no crashes on first launch

stories.title: Prepare and submit Android Google Play build
criteria: Given a release APK or AAB is generated, When it is submitted to Google Play Console, Then the build passes the content rating questionnaire and privacy policy URL requirement without policy violations
Given the app is approved, When a QA tester installs it on an Android 8.0 device, Then all core task functions work correctly and the app does not request any unnecessary permissions

stories.title: Create store listing assets and privacy policy
criteria: Given store submission requirements, When the 3d_team delivers the app icon, Then icons are provided in all required sizes for both iOS and Android platform guidelines with no transparency violations on iOS

Given both storefronts require a privacy policy URL, When the policy page is published, Then it accurately states no personal data is collected and the URL resolves correctly on both store listing pages

stories.title: Validate data persistence and edge case handling
criteria: Given the app has tasks stored, When the device is restarted and the app is reopened, Then all task data is fully intact with no missing or corrupted records

Given the user enters a task title at the maximum 120-character limit, When the task is saved and displayed, Then the title is stored completely and the row layout does not overflow or truncate incorrectly

stories.title: Perform cross-device UI and regression testing
criteria: Given the release candidate build, When tested on iPhone SE 3rd gen, iPhone 14 Pro Max, a mid-range Android phone, and a large Android tablet in portrait mode, Then all screens render without layout overflow, text clipping, or broken components
Given all Must Have stories are complete, When a full regression test pass is executed against all acceptance criteria, Then zero critical or high severity defects remain unresolved before submission
